activated_rules.rule_name: General Goods Description with Invoice Reference
EU Origin Normalization with Extra EU Members in Invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor "AB Volvo Penta" with address in Sweden is exactly identified in the invoice in header and company address blocks with consistent land indication Sweden. No deviations or contradictions found. Simple normalization applied (case, spacing, corporate form).

consignee.motivation: Consignee "Khonaysser Power Factory WLL" with address Qatar is explicitly identified in invoice consignee field and address. Land Qatar matches exactly. Certificate consignee matches invoice consignee after normalization.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains general goods description "Industrial Diesel Engines and accessories" and references invoice number 61622463/1S dated 2026-03-02. Invoice has matching description "Accessories & Industrial Diesel Engine" and matching invoice number and date. General goods description with invoice reference rule applied, no further textual match required.

quantity.motivation: Gross Weight quantity 22678.00 KG from certificate is explicitly found as Total Gross Weight 22678.00 KG in invoice. Units and numeric values match exactly, decimal truncation not needed. Certificate weight visible in Quantity box 7 matches total gross weight in invoice summary.

origin.motivation: Certificate indicates multiple origins "European Union", "Sweden" and "Lithuania". Invoice explicitly contains origins "European Union", "Sweden", and "Lithuania" in origin fields. EU origin normalization applied. All certificate origin countries are explicitly identified in invoice origin fields with allowed normalizations.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points matched explicitly between certificate and invoice after allowed normalizations. No contradictions or mismatches found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
